title: neevalay.com
text: Neevalay Tots Nurturing Roots, Shaping the Future Neevalay, from the Sanskrit words “Neev” (Foundation) and “Alay” (Home), symbolizes a nurturing place where little tots take root, grow, and flourish. Schedule a Personal Tour Explore Our Programs Our Pillars Research-Driven Emotionally Nurturing Global Pedagogy Child-Centric Technology-Integrated Professionally Managed Our passion is childhood, and we’re in Neevalay At Neevalay Tots – A Research-Driven Global Preschool, inspired by the words “Neev” (foundation) and “Alay” (home) and guided by the belief that strong foundations shape strong futures, we aspire to create an environment where curiosity, creativity, confidence, and compassion flourish — empowering children to become thoughtful, innovative, and responsible citizens of tomorrow. title: Founder Notes – neevalay.com
text: Founder’s Welcome & Our Story Founder’s Welcome Founder’s Welcome Note Dear Parents, Neevalay was a dream long before it became a school. While our doors are new, the vision behind them is not. It carries the belief of five generations—each of whom saw education as the strongest foundation a life can have. My great-grandmother passed down a simple principle that still guides us today “Saraswati ke pichhe bhaago—baaki sab kuchh swayam hi mil jayega.” In simple words: chase knowledge, and everything else in life will follow on its own. Over the years, I have seen how differently children begin their journeys. Not everyone starts with the same space, support, or sense of safety—and one question stayed with me: “Why can’t every child have four walls in their classroom?” That question is one of the reasons Neevalay exists. We named it Neevalay— Neev (foundation) and Aalay (home)—because that

title: Founder Notes – neevalay.com
text: walls in their classroom?” That question is one of the reasons Neevalay exists. We named it Neevalay— Neev (foundation) and Aalay (home)—because that is exactly what we want to offer: a strong foundation in a place that feels like home. We’ve built Neevalay to be a calm, caring second home—where your child will be loved, listened to, and gently guided. Here, play is respected, curiosity is protected, and learning unfolds naturally at your child’s pace. This is not a race. It’s a rhythm—your child’s rhythm. Our promise “If a child cannot learn the way we teach, we teach the way the child learns.” Thank you for considering us. We look forward to welcoming your family. Dr. Pranay Jha Founder, Neevalay “We can be overdressed, but we can never be overeducated.” Our Story The Beginning — a thought that started Neevalay From the founder’s pen… “Why do all classrooms need four walls?” This one t

title: Founder Notes – neevalay.com
text: e overeducated.” Our Story The Beginning — a thought that started Neevalay From the founder’s pen… “Why do all classrooms need four walls?” This one thought stayed with me for years—and slowly became the heartbeat of Neevalay. Neevalay comes from “Neev” (foundation) and “Aalay” (home). And that is exactly what we are building: a nurturing home where strong foundations for lifelong learning are created. Three phases of life — one realization: something was missing When I was a child, after school, I used to study with my grandfather—often outdoors, under the shade of a tree. We didn’t have a study room or benches. Just a simple khaat (cot) that we kept moving as the sun moved. “Jaha jaha dhoop aati thi, khaat waise waise ghoomti thi.” It was simple. It was real. And it taught me that education doesn’t begin with walls—it begins with the right environment, patience, and care. As I grew old

title: Founder Notes – neevalay.com
text: simple. It was real. And it taught me that education doesn’t begin with walls—it begins with the right environment, patience, and care. As I grew older, that thought became deeper. I would sometimes see children near construction sites while their parents worked long hours— full of curiosity, full of life—yet often without a safe, enriching space around them. A quiet question grew inside me: Why do some children begin in beautiful classrooms, while others are still waiting for one? They have the same spark. The same potential. Just not the same opportunity. Later, in my professional journey, I travelled across countries in Asia, Europe, and North America. Early learning environments looked different—some structured, some play-based—but one thing was consistent: children were encouraged to ask, express, create, and think freely. They grew up with confidence, empathy, and ideas. It made m

title: Founder Notes – neevalay.com
text: thing was consistent: children were encouraged to ask, express, create, and think freely. They grew up with confidence, empathy, and ideas. It made me reflect: what builds such societies? What gives people the courage to question, build, and lead? For me, the answer kept coming back to one place—the early years. The foundation years. The years where curiosity is protected, emotions are understood, and learning feels natural. And that’s how the seed of Neevalay was planted. Not just a school—but a sanctuary. A place where children feel safe, supported, and free to grow. A home where strong roots are nurtured gently— so that one day, they can stand tall… and soar. Explore Programs

title: Vision & Mission – neevalay.com
text: A calm, trusted foundation for every child—rooted in safety, care, and quality. “ Why don’t all classrooms have the same walls? ” Our Vision Inspired by “Neev” (foundation) and “Alay” (home)—and guided by the question, “Why don’t all classrooms have the same walls?”—we envision a world where every child begins in an early learning space built on the same essentials: safety, care, and quality. At Neevalay, we believe every child deserves a holistic, inclusive, high-quality beginning. We aspire to create an environment where curiosity, creativity, confidence, and compassion flourish—so children grow into thoughtful, innovative, and responsible citizens of tomorrow. Our Mission Guided by the NEP 2020 and the National Curriculum Framework, and inspired by global best practices, our mission is to create the right home for learning—not just another school, but a place where children truly thri

text: inspired by global best practices, our mission is to create the right home for learning—not just another school, but a place where children truly thrive. title: Meet Our Team – neevalay.com
text: Our People Philosophy We are in the process of building a passionate team at Neevalay Tots. Come join us and be part of this meaningful journey. OUR APPROACH Building with Purpose & Precision At Neevalay Tots, we believe that exceptional early education begins with exceptional educators. We are currently in the final stages of assembling our founding faculty—a deliberate, multi-step process where we select not just qualified professionals, but passionate mentors who embody our research-driven philosophy. Each educator undergoes comprehensive training in our proprietary Neevalay Methodology before joining the classroom, ensuring they're not just teachers, but facilitators of curiosity and guardians of childhood wonder. Selective Screening 6-step screening process focusing on alignment with our vision, teaching philosophy, and emotional intelligence. Global Standards Requirement of early c

title: Meet Our Team – neevalay.com
text: step screening process focusing on alignment with our vision, teaching philosophy, and emotional intelligence. Global Standards Requirement of early childhood certifications and continuous professional development. title: Research Zone – neevalay.com
text: At Neevalay, we believe great learning happens when science meets compassion. Our Research Zone is dedicated to studying how children think, feel, explore, and grow. Using insights from child psychology, neuroscience, and global early-education practices, we design classroom activities that are meaningful, engaging, and developmentally appropriate. We continuously observe learning patterns, update our teaching methods, and refine our curriculum to make it more effective. Whether it’s language development, motor skills, sensory exploration, or emotional intelligence, every part of our program is backed by research and real classroom results. Our goal is simple — to create learning experiences that build strong foundations, spark curiosity, and prepare children for a bright and confident future.

title: Playgroup – neevalay.com
text: Playgroup (2–3 Years) Ages 2–3 years Timings 9:00 am – 12:00 pm Mondays – Fridays Teachers to Students Ratio 1 : 8 Aligned with NEP 2020 & NCF (Foundational Stage) Introduction Playgroup is a child’s first gentle step into a wider world. At Neevalay, we begin with what matters most: emotional safety, trust, and a calm rhythm that feels familiar. Children explore through sensory play, music, movement, stories, and open-ended materials. Educators observe closely and respond intentionally—so each child feels seen, supported, and ready to try again. Learning is never rushed. We protect play, build secure routines, and celebrate small wins—because confidence in the early years becomes courage for life. Guiding thought: A calm beginning builds a confident learner. Our blended curriculum: NEP/NCF-aligned play-based learning + inquiry projects + Montessori-inspired hands-on materials + Reggio-in

title: Playgroup – neevalay.com
text: confident learner. Our blended curriculum: NEP/NCF-aligned play-based learning + inquiry projects + Montessori-inspired hands-on materials + Reggio-inspired creative studios—thoughtfully adapted to each child’s readiness. title: Nursery – neevalay.com
text: Nursery (3–4 Years) Ages 3–4 years Timings 8:30 am – 12:30 pm Mondays – Fridays Teachers to Students Ratio 1 : 10 Aligned with NEP 2020 & NCF (Foundational Stage) Introduction Nursery is where children begin to grow from “I can” to “I will.” At this stage, language blossoms, friendships deepen, and curiosity becomes more purposeful. At Neevalay, we blend play-based learning with gentle structure—so children build independence without losing joy. Educators guide small-group experiences, observe interests, and extend learning through questions, stories, and hands-on materials. The result is a confident, expressive learner who feels safe to explore, make mistakes, and try again. Guiding thought: Children learn best when they feel safe, seen, and celebrated. title: Kindergarten – neevalay.com
text: Kindergarten (4–6 Years) Ages 4–6 years Timings 8:00 am – 2:30 pm Mondays – Fridays Teachers to Students Ratio 1 : 12 Aligned with NEP 2020 & NCF (Foundational Stage) Introduction Kindergarten at Neevalay is a year of confident growth—where curiosity deepens into inquiry, independence becomes responsibility, and play evolves into purposeful learning. Guided by NEP 2020 and the NCF for the Foundational Stage, we strengthen school readiness through developmentally appropriate experiences—without pressure or rote learning. Our blended curriculum combines inquiry-led projects, hands-on materials, language-rich classrooms, and creative studios—so children think, communicate, create, and collaborate. How we assess We use observation, work samples, and portfolios (not tests). Readiness is tracked across language, numeracy, self-regulation, and social confidence—shared through clear parent updates. title: Daycare – neevalay.com
text: Daycare (2–6 Years) Ages 2–6 years Timings 8:00 am – 6:30 pm Mondays – Saturdays Caregiver-to-Child Ratio Age-based ratios (1:4 to 1:8) Aligned with NEP 2020 & NCF (Foundational Stage) Introduction Neevalay Daycare is designed for working families who want more than “safe keeping.” It’s a calm, homelike environment where care, comfort, and meaningful learning are woven into the day. Children follow predictable routines—meals, rest, outdoor play, and enriching activities—while still enjoying free play and choice. Guiding thought: A cared-for child becomes a confident child. Program Highlights Calm, supervised environment with play, rest & creativity zones Nutritious meal routine support Quiet nap & relaxation time Homework-free enrichment Daily outdoor play At a Glance Ages: 2–6 years Operating Hours: 8:00 am – 6:30 pm Care Options: Full-day / Half-day Flexible Plans: Per-hour care availa

Safety & Wellbeing Hygiene, emotional comfort, and gentle guidance are treated as essentials—not extras. Search

title: Enrichment – neevalay.com
text: Art & Creative Expression Encouraging imagination, problem-solving, and fine motor skills through open-ended art, craft, and design projects inspired by the Global frameworks. Music & Movement Building rhythm, coordination, and joy through singing, dancing, and creative movement—developing body awareness and self-confidence. Yoga & Mindfulness Helping children build focus, calm, and emotional balance through age-appropriate breathing, stretching, and mindfulness games. Emotional Intelligence Guiding children to recognize and express their feelings, develop empathy, and manage emotions through storytelling, reflection, and cooperative play. Language & Storytelling Strengthening listening, speaking, and early literacy skills through phonics, interactive stories, dramatization, and expressive communication—aligned with Global frameworks. STEM Explorers Introducing children to science, math,

title: Enrichment – neevalay.com
text: interactive stories, dramatization, and expressive communication—aligned with Global frameworks. STEM Explorers Introducing children to science, math, and technology through discovery, experiments, and hands-on problem-solving—encouraging curiosity and logical thinking. Ethical & Value Education Instilling kindness, honesty, respect, and gratitude through real-life examples, cultural celebrations, and daily reflections that build character and community values. Outdoor Discovery & Nature Learning Connecting children to nature through gardening, sensory exploration, and outdoor play—building environmental awareness and responsibility.

title: Parent Zone – neevalay.com
text: Your Child. Your Trust. Our Shared Promise. Choosing a preschool is an emotional decision. At Neevalay, we deeply respect that trust and partner with parents to ensure children feel safe, confident, and joyful every day. CCTV Monitored Campus First Aid & Emergency Ready Verified & Trained Educators A Calm, Secure Beginning Emotional safety comes first. Children are never rushed or pressured. Confidence is built gently through care and consistency. Parents as Partners We believe parents and educators must work together through open, respectful communication. Parent Handbook & Daily Routines Predictable daily routine Positive guidance & discipline Health, hygiene & attendance policies Transparent communication Curriculum & Learning Philosophy Play-based & inquiry-led learning Language, numeracy & creativity Social & emotional growth Gentle school readiness Health, Safety & Emotional Well-b

title: Kids Corner – neevalay.com

Visit ↗ Storyline Online Famous actors reading beloved picture books aloud. Visit ↗ Cool Math 4 Kids Early numbers, counting and gentle logic games. title: Franchisee – neevalay.com
text: Join hands with Neevalay, a research-based and child-centered preschool brand, and unlock a rewarding business opportunity in early education. At Neevalay, we offer a complete support system that helps you start, manage, and grow your preschool with confidence. From academic frameworks to branding and operations, we ensure you are never alone in the journey. Why Partner With Us? Trusted & research-backed preschool model End-to-end setup and operational support Comprehensive teacher training programs Proven curriculum designed for early learners Strong parent community and brand credibility Apply Now

title: Cookie Policy – neevalay.com
text: Cookie Policy – Neevalay Tots Preschool Neevalay Tots Preschool (operated by Neevalay Education Private Limited) uses cookies to help our website function and to improve your experience, understand visitor behavior, and enhance website performance. Last updated: 9 July 2026 Please note: At present our website uses only essential cookies needed for basic functions such as forms, navigation, and security. We do not currently run analytics or advertising cookies. If we introduce them in future, we will update this policy and request your consent as required under the DPDP Act, 2023. What Are Cookies? Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help websites function properly and remember user preferences. Types of Cookies We Use 1. Essential Cookies Required for basic website functions (forms, navigation, security). 2. Performance Cookies Help us understand how visitors use our

title: Cookie Policy – neevalay.com
text: Essential Cookies Required for basic website functions (forms, navigation, security). 2. Performance Cookies Help us understand how visitors use our website (page visits, time spent). 3. Functional Cookies Remember your preferences such as language or region. 4. Marketing Cookies Only if we introduce advertising in future, and only with your consent (not currently in use). Why We Use Cookies Improve website speed Analyse traffic Enhance user experience Save user preferences Managing Cookies You can disable cookies anytime through your browser settings. However, certain parts of the website may not function properly without cookies. Updates to the Cookie Policy We may update this cookie policy when required. Latest version will always be available on this page. For cookie-related queries:

title: Timings and daily hours · Neevalay Tots
text: Neevalay Tots is open **Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM**. Half-day and full-day options are available across our programmes, and daycare extends through the day for working parents. For the exact schedule that suits your child's age and your routine, our team will gladly walk you through the options — reach us on WhatsApp or book a visit.

title: Programmes and ages · Neevalay Tots
text: We welcome children from about 2 to 8 years across a play-based, developmentally staged path: - **Playgroup** — 2 to 3 years - **Nursery** — 3 to 4 years - **Kindergarten (KG1 & KG2)** — 4 to 6 years - **Daycare** — full-day care for 2 to 6 years - **Enrichment** — specialised programmes for 3 to 8 years Each stage is designed around the child's developmental needs, blending structured learning with joyful, hands-on play.

title: Our teaching approach · Neevalay Tots
text: Neevalay's pedagogy is **child-centric, research-driven and play-based**, inspired by the **Montessori and Reggio Emilia** methods and aligned to India's National Curriculum Framework for the Foundational Stage (**NCF-FS 2022**) and **NEP 2020**. We nurture the whole child — cognitive, language, social-emotional, physical and creative development — through exploration, curiosity and warm, individual attention, rather than rote learning.

title: How to book a visit · Neevalay Tots
text: The best way to experience Neevalay is to visit us. You can **book a campus visit** through our enquiry form, message us on **WhatsApp**, or call our team — we'll find a convenient time and show you around. A visit lets you see the classrooms, meet our educators, and ask everything you'd like about your child's day with us.

title: How admissions work · Neevalay Tots
text: To apply, you can fill in our **admission form** online, and our team will guide you through the next steps — a campus visit, a warm interaction with your child, and confirming a place. We're happy to explain the whole process on a call or over WhatsApp so it feels simple and unhurried.

title: Fees and payment · Neevalay Tots
text: Fees vary by programme, age group and schedule (half-day, full-day or daycare). So that you get accurate, current numbers for your child's specific plan, our team shares the fee details directly — please reach us on WhatsApp or book a visit and we'll walk you through everything transparently.

title: Safety, hygiene and care · Neevalay Tots
text: Your child's safety and wellbeing are at the heart of everything we do. Our environment is designed to be secure, clean and nurturing, with caring educators supervising throughout the day.

title: Location and branches · Neevalay Tots
text: Neevalay Tots is located in **New Delhi**. For the exact address, directions, and the branch nearest you, our team will be glad to help — reach us on WhatsApp or call, and we'll point you the right way.

title: Contact us · Neevalay Tots
text: You can reach the Neevalay Tots team on **WhatsApp / phone at +91 97117 52584**, by email at **hello@neevalay.com**, or through the website **neevalay.com**. We're here Monday to Saturday and always happy to help you and your little one.
